title: ukulib
description: small utility library used in my mods
body:
![banner](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/uku3lig/ukulib/main/banner.png)

[![Modrinth Downloads](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/dt/ukulib?logo=modrinth&logoColor=1bd96a&color=1bd96a)](https://modrinth.com/mod/ukulib)
[![Maven metadata URL](https://img.shields.io/maven-metadata/v?metadataUrl=https%3A%2F%2Fmaven.uku3lig.net%2Freleases%2Fnet%2Fuku3lig%2Fukulib-common%2Fmaven-metadata.xml&color=brightgreen)](https://maven.uku3lig.net/#/releases/net/uku3lig/ukulib)

[![Common javadoc](https://img.shields.io/badge/javadoc-common-blue)](https://maven.uku3lig.net/javadoc/releases/net/uku3lig/ukulib-common/latest)
[![Fabric javadoc](https://img.shields.io/badge/javadoc-fabric-DBD0B4)](https://maven.uku3lig.net/javadoc/releases/net/uku3lig/ukulib-fabric/latest)
[![Neoforge javadoc](https://img.shields.io/badge/javadoc-neoforge-d7742f)](https://maven.uku3lig.net/javadoc/releases/net/uku3lig/ukulib-neoforge/latest)

**ukulib** is a Minecraft library mod developed throughout the years for my multitude of mods, with many useful
capabilities!

## Features

- Compatible with both Fabric and NeoForge
- Simple but comprehensive and powerful configuration system, with utilities and widgets for config screens
- Various Minecraft related utilities
- ... and more to come!

## Usage

See [the documentation](https://uku3lig.github.io/ukulib).
